en: Forearms on floor, body in straight line.
Squeeze glutes + abs — neutral spine.
Hold for time, don't let hips sag.
zh-Hans: 前臂着地, 身体呈直线.
收紧臀部和腹部 — 脊柱中立.
保持时间, 不要让髋部下垂.

en: Top of push-up position, arms locked.
Brace core, glutes tight, body straight.
Hold for time, breathe steadily.
zh-Hans: 俯卧撑顶端姿势, 手臂锁定.
核心收紧, 臀部夹紧, 身体直线.
保持时间, 稳定呼吸.

en: Side-lying, prop on one forearm.
Lift hips — body in straight line.
Hold for time, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧躺, 一侧前臂撑地.
抬起髋部 — 身体呈直线.
保持时间, 换边.

en: Start in forearm plank, body straight.
Push up to high plank one arm at a time.
Lower back to forearms, alternate lead arm.
zh-Hans: 前臂平板支撑, 身体直线.
一只手撑起到高位平板.
依次下放, 交替起手.

en: Forearm plank position, body straight.
Rotate hips, dip one side toward floor.
Return to center, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 前臂平板, 身体直线.
旋转髋部, 一侧下沉接近地面.
回到中位, 交替进行.

en: Forearm plank, elbows under shoulders.
Max tension — squeeze glutes, quads, abs.
Hold 10-30s with full body tension.
zh-Hans: 前臂平板, 肘部置于肩下.
全力收紧 — 臀腿腹同时发力.
保持 10-30 秒, 全身张力.

en: Plank position, plate on upper back.
Brace core hard, don't let hips sag.
Hold for time — quality over duration.
zh-Hans: 平板支撑, 杠片放上背.
核心紧绷, 髋部不下垂.
保持时间 — 质量优先.

en: Have a partner place the plate — don't drop on spine.
zh-Hans: 请同伴放置杠片 — 不要砸到脊柱.

en: Side plank position, body straight.
Lift top leg up while holding side plank.
Lower under control, switch sides after set.
zh-Hans: 侧平板姿势, 身体直线.
保持侧平板, 上腿向上抬起.
缓慢下放, 完成后换边.

en: High plank, hands under shoulders.
Tap opposite shoulder with one hand.
Keep hips square — minimize rotation.
zh-Hans: 高位平板, 手在肩下.
一手拍向对侧肩膀.
髋部保持稳定 — 尽量不晃动.

en: High plank, body straight.
Reach one arm forward, hold briefly.
Return, alternate arms — stay stable.
zh-Hans: 高位平板, 身体直线.
一只手向前伸, 短暂停顿.
收回, 交替 — 保持稳定.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, hands at temples.
Curl upper body up — shoulders off floor.
Squeeze abs at top, lower slowly.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 双手贴太阳穴.
上身卷起 — 肩部离地.
顶部收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Lie on back, hands at temples, legs raised.
Bring opposite elbow to knee, extend other leg.
Alternate sides in pedaling motion.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 手贴太阳穴, 双腿抬起.
对侧肘碰膝, 另一腿伸出.
交替进行 — 像蹬自行车.

en: Lie on back, arms at sides, knees bent.
Curl knees toward chest — lift hips.
Lower slowly, don't let feet touch floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手放体侧, 屈膝.
膝向胸卷起 — 髋部抬起.
缓慢下放, 双脚不触地.

en: Lie on decline bench, ankles hooked.
Curl torso up — keep lower back flat.
Squeeze at top, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 躺下斜凳, 脚踝勾住.
上身卷起 — 下背贴凳.
顶部收紧, 控制下放.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, plate on chest.
Curl upper body up — shoulders off floor.
Squeeze abs, lower under control.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 杠片放胸前.
上身卷起 — 肩离地.
腹部收紧, 缓慢下放.

en: Kneel facing cable, rope at top.
Crunch down — bring elbows to thighs.
Curl spine, don't pull with arms.
zh-Hans: 跪姿面对绳索, 绳索置高位.
向下卷腹 — 肘部碰大腿.
脊柱弯曲, 不要用手臂拉.

en: Sit on ab machine, grip handles.
Crunch torso forward — curl spine.
Squeeze at bottom, return slowly.
zh-Hans: 坐在卷腹器械上, 抓握手柄.
上身前卷 — 脊柱弯曲.
底部收紧, 缓慢返回.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, feet flat.
Sit up fully — torso to thighs.
Lower with control to start.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 双脚平放.
完全坐起 — 上身贴近大腿.
控制下放回起始.

en: Lie on decline bench, ankles hooked.
Sit up fully against decline angle.
Lower with control, full range of motion.
zh-Hans: 躺下斜凳, 脚踝勾住.
对抗角度完全坐起.
控制下放, 全程动作.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, plate on chest.
Sit up fully — torso vertical.
Lower with control, plate stays on chest.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 杠片放胸前.
完全坐起 — 上身垂直.
控制下放, 杠片保持胸前.

en: Lie on back, arms overhead, legs straight.
Sit up while keeping legs and arms extended.
Lower with control — keep abs braced.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双臂过头, 双腿伸直.
保持手腿伸直, 完成坐起.
控制下放 — 腹部持续收紧.

en: Hang from bar, arms straight.
Raise straight legs to 90° — no swinging.
Lower under control, repeat.
zh-Hans: 悬挂单杠, 手臂伸直.
直腿抬到 90° — 不要借力摆动.
缓慢下放, 重复.

en: Hang from bar, arms straight.
Bring knees to chest — control swing.
Lower under control.
zh-Hans: 悬挂单杠, 手臂伸直.
屈膝上提至胸前 — 控制摆动.
缓慢下放.

en: Lie on back, hands under hips.
Raise straight legs to 90° — slow.
Lower until just above floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手垫臀下.
直腿抬到 90° — 缓慢.
下放至接近地面.

en: Forearms on pads, back against pad.
Raise straight legs to 90°.
Lower under control — no swinging.
zh-Hans: 前臂支撑, 背贴靠垫.
直腿抬至 90°.
缓慢下放 — 不要借力.

en: Forearms on pads, back against pad.
Bring knees to chest.
Lower with control, repeat.
zh-Hans: 前臂支撑, 背贴靠垫.
屈膝向胸前提拉.
缓慢下放, 重复.

en: Lie on back, hands under hips.
Bring knees toward chest.
Lower with control, repeat.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手垫臀下.
屈膝向胸前提拉.
缓慢下放, 重复.

en: Sit on floor, lean back, feet up.
Rotate torso side to side.
Keep core braced, chest tall.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 上身后倾, 双脚抬起.
上身左右转体.
核心收紧, 挺胸.

en: Sit on floor, lean back, holding weight.
Rotate torso side to side, tap weight.
Keep feet up, core braced.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 上身后倾, 握重物.
上身左右转体, 重物两侧轻触.
双脚抬起, 核心收紧.

en: Sit on floor, lean back, hold ball.
Rotate torso, tap ball each side.
Feet up, controlled tempo.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 上身后倾, 握药球.
转体, 球两侧轻触.
双脚抬起, 节奏可控.

en: Kneel, grip ab wheel below shoulders.
Roll forward — extend arms, brace core.
Pull back to start, don't let hips sag.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 双手握轮置肩下.
向前推 — 手臂伸展, 核心紧绷.
拉回起点, 髋部不下垂.

en: Don't arch lower back — keep ribs tucked.
zh-Hans: 不要塌腰 — 收紧肋骨.

en: Stand, bend at hips, grip ab wheel.
Roll forward — body extends, no sag.
Pull back to standing — full control.
zh-Hans: 站立, 髋部前屈, 握腹轮.
向前推 — 身体伸展, 不塌腰.
拉回站立 — 全程控制.

en: Master kneeling version first — high injury risk.
zh-Hans: 先掌握跪姿 — 受伤风险高.

en: Lie on back, arms up, knees at 90°.
Lower opposite arm and leg slowly.
Return, alternate sides — flat lower back.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手举起, 屈膝 90°.
对侧手脚缓慢下放.
回起点, 交替 — 下背贴地.

en: Quadruped, hands under shoulders.
Extend opposite arm and leg.
Hold briefly, return, alternate.
zh-Hans: 四点跪姿, 手在肩下.
对侧手脚伸展.
短暂停顿, 回起点, 交替.

en: Stand sideways to cable at chest height.
Press handle straight out — resist rotation.
Hold, return, switch sides after set.
zh-Hans: 侧对绳索, 把手齐胸高.
把手直推 — 抗旋转.
保持, 收回, 完成后换边.

en: Anchor band at chest height, stand sideways.
Press band out straight — resist pull.
Hold, return, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 弹力带固定齐胸高, 侧站.
弹力带直推 — 抗旋转.
保持, 收回, 换边.

en: Half-kneel beside cable, hold handle.
Press straight out — fight rotation.
Hold 2-3s, return, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 半跪侧对绳索, 握把手.
直推 — 抗旋转.
停顿 2-3 秒, 收回, 换边.

en: Hang from bar, slight kip swing.
Drive toes up to touch bar.
Lower under control, repeat.
zh-Hans: 悬挂单杠, 微微摆动.
脚尖向上踢碰杆.
控制下放, 重复.

en: Use chalk and a strong grip — risk of tearing hands.
zh-Hans: 使用镁粉和稳定握法 — 防止手部撕裂.

en: High plank position, body straight.
Drive knees toward chest alternately.
Fast pace — hips low, core tight.
zh-Hans: 高位平板, 身体直线.
交替屈膝向胸推进.
快速节奏 — 髋低, 核心紧.

en: High plank, drive knee to opposite elbow.
Alternate sides — controlled rotation.
Keep hips low, brace core.
zh-Hans: 高位平板, 膝向对侧肘.
交替进行 — 旋转可控.
髋部低, 核心紧.

en: Lie on bench, grip behind head.
Lift body straight — only shoulders touch.
Lower slowly, body in rigid line.
zh-Hans: 卧凳, 双手抓凳后.
整身抬起 — 仅肩部接触.
缓慢下放, 身体保持直线.

en: Progress from tuck → straddle → full flag.
Risk of neck strain if form breaks.
zh-Hans: 进阶: 屈腿 → 分腿 → 完全龙旗.
动作变形可能拉伤颈部.

en: Lie flat, arms overhead, legs straight.
Simultaneously lift legs and torso to V.
Touch hands to feet, lower with control.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手过头, 双腿伸直.
上身和双腿同时抬起成 V 形.
手碰脚, 控制下放.

en: Lie flat, arms overhead, legs straight.
Bring knees in while sitting up.
Touch knees, lower flat under control.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手过头, 双腿伸直.
屈膝上提同时坐起.
手碰膝, 控制下放回起点.

en: Lie on back, low back pressed to floor.
Lift legs and shoulders — arms overhead.
Hold rigid hollow shape for time.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 下背压地.
抬起腿和肩 — 双手过头.
保持空心姿势, 计时.

en: Hollow hold position — abs tight.
Rock back and forth as a rigid unit.
Maintain shape, don't lose hollow.
zh-Hans: 空心姿势 — 腹部紧绷.
整身前后摇摆, 保持刚性.
维持空心形态, 不变形.

en: Support on parallel bars or floor.
Lift legs straight to horizontal.
Hold L shape — arms locked.
zh-Hans: 双杠或地面支撑.
直腿抬至水平.
保持 L 形 — 手臂锁定.

en: Lie on back, legs straight, just off floor.
Alternate small up-down leg kicks.
Lower back pressed flat to floor.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双腿直, 微微抬起.
交替小幅上下踢腿.
下背贴地.

en: Lie on back, legs straight, just off floor.
Cross legs horizontally — scissor pattern.
Lower back flat, controlled motion.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双腿直, 微抬起.
双腿水平交叉 — 剪刀动作.
下背贴地, 动作可控.

en: Lie on back, legs raised.
Pedal legs in cycling motion.
Keep core engaged, lower back flat.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双腿抬起.
做蹬自行车的动作.
核心收紧, 下背贴地.

en: Stand, dumbbell in one hand at side.
Bend laterally toward dumbbell side.
Return upright by squeezing opposite oblique.
zh-Hans: 站立, 单手持哑铃于体侧.
向哑铃侧屈干.
对侧腹斜肌发力起身.

en: Stand sideways to cable, low pulley.
Grip handle, bend away from machine.
Return upright, controlled motion.
zh-Hans: 侧对绳索, 低位滑轮.
握把手, 向远离机器侧屈干.
返回直立, 动作可控.

en: Lie on back, arms out, legs straight up.
Rotate legs side to side — like wipers.
Shoulders flat, controlled tempo.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双手张开, 双腿垂直举起.
双腿左右摆动 — 像雨刷.
肩部平地, 节奏可控.

en: Hang from bar, raise legs to 90°.
Rotate legs side to side.
Controlled motion — no swinging.
zh-Hans: 悬挂单杠, 直腿抬至 90°.
双腿左右摆动.
动作可控 — 不要借力.

en: Cable at high pulley, stand sideways.
Pull handle down across body to opposite hip.
Return slowly, rotate from core.
zh-Hans: 绳索置高位, 侧对机器.
把手斜向下拉至对侧髋.
缓慢返回, 核心带动旋转.

en: Cable at low pulley, stand sideways.
Pull handle up across body to opposite shoulder.
Return slowly, rotate from core.
zh-Hans: 绳索置低位, 侧对机器.
把手斜向上拉至对侧肩.
缓慢返回, 核心带动旋转.

en: Lie on back, legs straight up.
Reach hands up to touch toes.
Lower with control, repeat.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双腿垂直抬起.
双手向上触脚尖.
控制下放, 重复.

en: Lie on back, knees bent, slight crunch.
Reach side to side to tap heels.
Keep shoulders off floor throughout.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝, 微微卷腹.
左右触碰脚跟.
全程肩部离地.

en: Sit on machine, adjust pad to shoulders.
Crunch torso forward against resistance.
Squeeze abs, return under control.
zh-Hans: 坐器械上, 靠垫调至肩部.
对抗阻力向前卷腹.
腹部收紧, 控制返回.

en: Sit, hands behind, legs straight up at angle.
Lower torso back as legs lower.
Return to V — abs in constant tension.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 手撑后, 双腿斜上方.
上身后倒同时双腿下放.
返回 V 形 — 腹部持续紧绷.

en: Side plank position, body straight.
Lower hips toward floor, then raise.
Squeeze obliques at top, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧平板姿势, 身体直线.
髋部向地面下沉再抬起.
顶部收紧腹斜肌, 换边.

en: Hang from bar, knees together.
Raise knees to one side at angle.
Lower, alternate sides — no swinging.
zh-Hans: 悬挂单杠, 双膝并拢.
膝向一侧斜向上提.
下放, 交替 — 不借力.

en: Sit on floor, one leg extended, other bent.
Hinge from hips, reach toward toes.
Hold 20-30s, feel stretch in back of thigh.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 一腿伸直一腿弯曲.
髋部前倾, 双手伸向脚尖.
保持 20-30 秒, 大腿后侧拉伸.

en: Stand, feet together, knees slightly bent.
Hinge from hips, hands reach to floor.
Relax neck, hold 20-30s.
zh-Hans: 站立, 双脚并拢, 微屈膝.
髋部前屈, 双手触地.
颈部放松, 保持 20-30 秒.

en: Lie on back, lift one leg straight up.
Grip behind thigh, pull toward chest.
Hold 20-30s, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 单腿垂直抬起.
握大腿后侧, 拉向胸前.
保持 20-30 秒, 换腿.

name.zh-Hans: 腘绳肌拉伸 (仰卧, 带子)

en: Lie on back, loop strap around one foot.
Lift leg straight, pull strap to deepen.
Hold 20-30s, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 弹力带绕脚.
直腿抬起, 拉带子加深拉伸.
保持 20-30 秒, 换腿.

en: Stand on one leg, grab other ankle behind.
Pull heel to glute, knees together.
Hold 20-30s, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 单腿站立, 后伸手抓另脚踝.
拉脚跟向臀部, 双膝并拢.
保持 20-30 秒, 换腿.

en: Lie on side, grab top ankle.
Pull heel to glute, hip extended.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 抓住上方脚踝.
拉脚跟向臀部, 髋部伸展.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Kneel with back shin against wall/bench.
Front foot forward, lean torso upright.
Hold 30-60s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 后腿胫骨贴墙或凳.
前脚向前, 上身保持直立.
保持 30-60 秒, 换边.

en: Hands on wall, one leg back.
Back heel pressed flat to floor.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 双手扶墙, 一腿后撤.
后脚跟压紧地面.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Start in plank, lift hips into V shape.
Press heels toward floor.
Hold 20-30s, alternate pedal heels.
zh-Hans: 平板起, 髋部抬高成 V 形.
脚跟向下压地.
保持 20-30 秒, 可交替踩腿.

en: Stand near wall, one leg back, knee bent.
Sink hips, both heels stay on floor.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 近墙站立, 一腿后撤屈膝.
下沉髋部, 双脚跟贴地.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Kneel with one knee, other foot forward.
Tuck pelvis, sink hips forward.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 单膝跪地, 另一脚前.
骨盆后倾, 髋部前推.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Lunge position, back knee on floor.
Raise arms overhead, lean back slightly.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 弓步, 后膝着地.
双手过头, 微微后仰.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Front leg bent in front, shin angled.
Back leg extended straight behind.
Lean forward, hold 30-60s, switch.
zh-Hans: 前腿弯曲在前, 小腿斜放.
后腿向后伸直.
前倾, 保持 30-60 秒, 换边.

en: Lie on back, cross one ankle over opposite knee.
Pull supporting thigh toward chest.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 一脚踝交叉放对侧膝上.
拉支撑腿大腿向胸前.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Lie on back, pull one knee across body.
Use opposite hand to guide knee down.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 单膝拉向对侧.
对侧手引导膝下压.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Sit, soles of feet together, knees out.
Hold ankles, gently press knees down.
Lean forward to deepen, hold 20-30s.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 双脚掌相对, 膝外展.
抓脚踝, 轻压双膝向下.
前倾加深, 保持 20-30 秒.

en: On all fours, knees wide, feet flexed.
Sink hips back, keep spine neutral.
Hold 30-60s, breathe slowly.
zh-Hans: 四点跪, 膝盖宽开, 脚背勾起.
髋部后坐, 脊柱中立.
保持 30-60 秒, 缓慢呼吸.

en: Stand wide, shift weight to one bent leg.
Other leg straight, foot flat.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 宽步距站立, 单腿屈膝下蹲.
另一腿伸直, 脚平贴地.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Sit on floor, legs out wide.
Hinge from hips, reach forward.
Hold 30-60s, breathe deeply.
zh-Hans: 坐地, 双腿大幅分开.
髋部前屈, 双手前伸.
保持 30-60 秒, 深呼吸.

en: Stand in doorway, arms on frame at 90°.
Step forward to feel chest stretch.
Hold 20-30s, adjust arm height.
zh-Hans: 站门框中, 双臂 90° 撑门框.
前迈一步, 感受胸部拉伸.
保持 20-30 秒, 可调整高度.

en: Stand sideways near wall, one arm back.
Palm on wall, rotate body away.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧身靠墙, 单手后撑墙.
手掌贴墙, 上身向远离墙旋转.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Pull one arm across body at chest height.
Opposite hand grips elbow, pull gently.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 单臂横跨胸前.
对侧手扣住肘部, 轻拉.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Side-lying, bottom arm out, elbow 90°.
Use top hand to push forearm down.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 下方手臂前伸, 肘 90°.
上方手向下推前臂.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Don't force — shoulder is delicate. Stop if sharp pain.
zh-Hans: 不要强压 — 肩部脆弱, 锐痛立即停止.

en: Hold band wide overhead, arms straight.
Rotate band from front to behind back.
Reverse — smooth, controlled motion.
zh-Hans: 宽握弹力带于头顶, 手臂伸直.
弹力带从前向后翻至背后.
反向重复 — 动作平稳可控.

en: Reach one arm overhead, bend at elbow.
Hand drops behind head.
Opposite hand pulls elbow, hold 20-30s.
zh-Hans: 单臂过头, 屈肘.
手掌下放至背后.
对侧手拉肘, 保持 20-30 秒.

en: One hand reaches over shoulder, other below.
Clasp hands behind back.
Hold 20-30s, switch arms.
zh-Hans: 一手过肩, 一手从下穿过.
背后双手相扣.
保持 20-30 秒, 换手.

en: Place palm on wall behind you, arm straight.
Rotate body away from wall.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 手掌贴身后墙, 手臂伸直.
上身向远离墙方向转.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Hang from bar, arms straight.
Relax shoulders, let body decompress.
Hold 20-30s — focus on lat stretch.
zh-Hans: 悬挂单杠, 手臂伸直.
放松双肩, 身体下沉.
保持 20-30 秒 — 感受背阔肌拉伸.

en: Kneel, sit on heels, fold forward.
Arms extended overhead, palms down.
Walk hands to one side to deepen lat.
zh-Hans: 跪坐脚跟上, 上身前折.
双臂向前伸, 手掌朝下.
双手移向一侧加深背阔肌拉伸.

en: Kneel facing bench, forearms on bench.
Sit hips back, drop chest down.
Hold 30-60s, breathe deeply.
zh-Hans: 面对长凳跪姿, 前臂放凳上.
髋部后坐, 胸部下沉.
保持 30-60 秒, 深呼吸.

en: Quadruped position, neutral spine.
Arch back, look up (cow).
Round back, tuck chin (cat) — alternate.
zh-Hans: 四点跪姿, 脊柱中立.
塌腰仰头 (牛式).
拱背收下巴 (猫式) — 交替.

en: Kneel, knees wide, big toes touching.
Sit on heels, fold forward, arms extended.
Forehead to floor, hold 30-60s.
zh-Hans: 跪姿, 双膝外开, 拇趾相对.
坐脚跟, 上身前折, 双臂伸展.
额头触地, 保持 30-60 秒.

en: Lie on back, arms out wide.
Drop bent knees to one side.
Look opposite way, hold 20-30s.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双臂张开.
屈膝双腿落向一侧.
头看反方向, 保持 20-30 秒.

en: Sit, one leg straight, other bent across.
Twist torso, opposite elbow on outer knee.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 一腿伸直, 另一腿屈膝交叉.
上身扭转, 对侧肘抵膝外.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Lie face down, hands by chest.
Press up, arch back, hips on floor.
Hold 20-30s, feel abs stretch.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 双手撑胸两侧.
推起仰头, 髋部贴地.
保持 20-30 秒, 感受腹部拉伸.

en: Sit or stand, tall posture.
Tilt head to one side, ear to shoulder.
Hand gently assists, hold 15-20s.
zh-Hans: 坐或站, 挺直身体.
头向一侧倾, 耳贴肩.
同侧手轻辅助, 保持 15-20 秒.

en: Sit or stand, head over shoulders.
Pull chin straight back — double chin.
Hold 5s, release, repeat 10-15x.
zh-Hans: 坐或站, 头在肩上方.
下巴向后收 — 出现双下巴.
保持 5 秒, 放松, 重复 10-15 次.

en: Sit or stand, shoulders relaxed.
Turn head slowly side to side.
Hold each side 15-20s.
zh-Hans: 坐或站, 肩部放松.
头缓慢左右转动.
每边保持 15-20 秒.

en: Face down, foam roller under thighs.
Roll from hip to knee slowly.
Pause on tight spots 20-30s.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 泡沫轴置大腿下.
缓慢从髋滚到膝.
紧绷点停留 20-30 秒.

en: Sit, foam roller under one hamstring.
Use hands to push body, roll back of thigh.
Pause on tight spots, switch legs.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 泡沫轴置大腿后.
双手撑地, 推动身体滚动.
紧绷点停留, 换腿.

en: Sit, foam roller under calves.
Lift hips, roll from knee to ankle.
Cross legs for more pressure.
zh-Hans: 坐姿, 泡沫轴置小腿后.
抬起髋部, 滚动膝至踝.
可叠腿增加压力.

en: Lie on side, foam roller under outer thigh.
Roll from hip to knee.
Pause on tender spots, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 泡沫轴置大腿外侧下.
滚动髋至膝.
紧绷点停留, 换边.

en: Sit on foam roller, cross one ankle to knee.
Lean to one side, roll over glute.
Pause on tight spots, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 坐泡沫轴上, 一脚踝交叉膝上.
侧倾压臀, 滚动.
紧绷点停留, 换边.

en: Side-lying, arm overhead, roller under lat.
Roll from armpit down ribs.
Pause on tender spots, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 侧卧, 单臂过头, 泡沫轴置背阔肌下.
滚动腋下至肋骨.
紧绷点停留, 换边.

en: Lie on back, roller under upper back.
Hands behind head, lift hips slightly.
Roll from mid-back to shoulders.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 泡沫轴置上背下.
双手扶头, 微抬髋部.
中背滚动至肩部.

en: Avoid lower back — only upper thoracic spine.
zh-Hans: 避开下背 — 只滚动胸椎部位.

en: Lie face down, roller under one chest.
Move arm overhead to roll pec.
Pause on tight spots, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 泡沫轴置单侧胸下.
手臂过头滚动胸肌.
紧绷点停留, 换边.

en: Lie on back, roller under thoracic spine.
Hands behind head, extend over roller.
Hold 5-10s, slide up, repeat.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 泡沫轴置胸椎下.
双手扶头, 上背向后伸展.
保持 5-10 秒, 上移, 重复.

en: Lunge forward, opposite hand on floor.
Reach inside-arm up to ceiling, rotate.
Hold 5-10s per rep, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 前弓步, 对侧手撑地.
内侧手向上伸, 旋转上身.
每次保持 5-10 秒, 换边.

en: Start on all fours.
Slide one arm under body, shoulder to floor.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 四点跪姿.
单臂穿过身体, 肩部贴地.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Extend arm forward, palm up.
Other hand pulls fingers back gently.
Hold 15-20s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 手臂前伸, 掌心朝上.
另一手轻拉指尖向后.
保持 15-20 秒, 换边.

en: Extend arm forward, palm down.
Other hand pulls fingers down.
Hold 15-20s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 手臂前伸, 掌心朝下.
另一手轻拉指尖向下.
保持 15-20 秒, 换边.

en: Lie on back, knees pulled to chest.
Grab outer feet, knees toward armpits.
Hold 30-60s, rock side to side.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 双膝拉向胸前.
抓脚外侧, 膝盖拉向腋下.
保持 30-60 秒, 可左右摇晃.

en: Lie on back, knees bent.
Pull both knees to chest with hands.
Hold 20-30s, rock side to side gently.
zh-Hans: 仰卧, 屈膝.
双手抱双膝拉向胸.
保持 20-30 秒, 可左右轻摇.

en: Lie face down, arms out wide.
Swing one leg over to opposite side.
Hold 20s, alternate sides.
zh-Hans: 俯卧, 双臂张开.
一腿翻向对侧.
保持 20 秒, 交替进行.

en: Stand wide stance, shift weight to one leg.
Squat low, other leg straight, toes up.
Hold 15-20s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 宽步距站立, 重心移单腿.
下蹲低位, 另腿伸直, 脚尖上.
保持 15-20 秒, 换边.

en: Stand tall, hinge at hips forward.
Let head and arms hang heavy.
Soft knees, hold 30-60s.
zh-Hans: 直立, 髋部前屈.
头和双臂自然垂下.
微屈膝, 保持 30-60 秒.

en: Sit tall, one hand under thigh anchored.
Tilt head to opposite side, hand on head.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 坐姿挺直, 一手压大腿下.
头侧倾, 另一手扶头.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Stand facing wall, forearm against wall.
Step forward, rotate body away.
Hold 20-30s, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 面对墙, 前臂贴墙.
前迈一步, 上身向外转.
保持 20-30 秒, 换边.

en: Sit or stand, lift one foot.
Rotate ankle in full circles.
10 reps each direction, switch sides.
zh-Hans: 坐或站, 单脚抬起.
踝关节大范围画圈.
每方向 10 次, 换边.
